headline: Mitek Partners with FICO to Strengthen Enterprise Fraud Defense
summary: By Karen Roman Mitek Systems, Inc. (Nasdaq: MITK) said its Mitek Verified Identity Platform is now available on FICO Marketplace, bringing identity intelligence into decisioning and workflows, and allowing joint […]
